subject: [PATCH 11/11] mm/zsmalloc: Handle charge migration in zpdesc substitution

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the patch's handling of partial compressed objects and suggested adding additional checks to ensure correct behavior.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series addresses charge migration in zsmalloc by handling zpdesc substitutions, which may change the node of compressed objects and their lruvec association. It takes special care to address partial compressed objects at the beginning and end of swapped-out zpdescs.

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the implementation of `zs_migrate_lruvec` and suggested using a different approach to handle charge migration.

2026-03-12.patch_summary: This patch series addresses charge migration in zsmalloc by handling zpdesc substitutions, which can change the node of compressed objects and their lruvec association. It introduces a new function `zs_migrate_lruvec` to transfer per-lruvec and node-level stats when a zspage replaces a zpdesc from a different NUMA node.

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the new function zs_migrate_lruvec(), suggesting that it might not handle the case where the old and new zspages have different sizes.

2026-03-13.patch_summary: This patch series addresses charge migration in zsmalloc by handling zpdesc substitutions, which can change the node association of compressed objects. It introduces a new function to update per-lruvec and node-level stats when a zspage replaces a zpdesc from a different NUMA node.
